faq.question: What is your typical engagement model?
faq.answer: We work with clients on a project basis, retainer basis, or hourly consulting. We discuss your specific needs and recommend the best approach.

faq.question: How long does a typical project take?
faq.answer: Project timelines vary based on scope and complexity. Most projects range from 4-12 weeks. We provide detailed timelines during the initial consultation.

faq.question: Do you offer support after project completion?
faq.answer: Yes! We offer ongoing support packages to ensure your success continues after launch. Maintenance and optimization are key to long-term success.

faq.question: What is your pricing structure?
faq.answer: Our pricing is customized based on project scope, complexity, and timeline. We offer competitive rates and flexible payment terms.
